title: Return Policy
text: Unused gear can be returned within 30 days with a receipt. Wetsuits must be unworn with tags attached. Surfboards are final sale once waxed.

title: Shipping and Delivery
text: Orders over $75 ship free in the continental United States. Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days. Surfboards take 7 to 10 business days because they ship by freight.

title: Damaged Orders
text: Photograph the packaging and item within 48 hours of delivery. Support may open a case after verifying the order number, but issuing a refund requires a manager.
